roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
PEOPLE'S Order Sealing Exhibits IN SUPPORT OF NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL

/CAL:DISPOSITION/X:AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TODISMISS THIS CASE PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/X: THE DEFENDANT ENTERS AHARVEY WAIVER,/X: ANY RESTITUTION OR STAY AWAY ORDERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURTNO,21003623 OR 22000524,/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING IS VACATED BY REQUEST OF THE PARTIES,/X:THE DEFENDANT STIPULATES TO EXTEND THE 60TH DAY IN THIS CASE,/STIPLD:06-03-22/CONTD:DISPOSITION/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING IS CONTINUED BY REQUEST OFTHE PARTIES,/X:DEFENDANT STIPULATES TO EXTEND THE 60TH DAY IN THIS CASE,//STIPLD:05-04-22/TE:1,5 DAYS FOR 3 CASES COMBINED/CONTD:READINESS STATUS ON 04-12-22/DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 04-29-22/DOP/

/CAL:INSTRUCTION, ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA, AND COUNSEL/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S)& DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX:03-28-22/NB/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TBH:2200079
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/NP/X:THE BAILIFF INDICATES DEFENDANT REFUSED TO APPEAR IN COURT TODAY,/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/NP/X:CONFLICT ATTORNEY APPEARING VIA ZOOM/X:DEFENDANT 4011,5PC/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/NP/X:SCOTT SUGARMAN APPERING VIA ZOOM,/DEF:4011,5/CAUSE//CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/DOPC/
